core_mechanism: reproducing an observed anomalous signal by tuning the free spatial-inhomogeneity profile of an exact solution to a nonlinear field equation, so that signal propagation (non-straight rays) through a non-uniform medium mimics the effect otherwise attributed to an added source term — an inverse fit exposing a degeneracy between medium inhomogeneity and an extra driving component
brief_reason: The abstract fits the data by choosing a spatial curvature (inhomogeneity) function of an exact, symmetry-free solution to the governing equations, with non-radial (bent) geodesics, so that propagation through the lumpy medium accounts for the apparent acceleration without invoking a separate dark-energy component.
